known_issues: Save diagram: entire diagram element is draggable instead of only the thumbnail preview image

existing_features.title: In the AttackPathToolbar (and any related save diagram UI), fix drag-and-drop so that only the thumbnail preview image of a saved diagram is draggable onto the canvas. The surrounding element (labels, borders, background, buttons) must not be draggable. Apply draggable={true} and drag event handlers exclusively to the thumbnail element, and set draggable={false} on the parent container and all sibling elements.

projectName: Fix drag-and-drop in save diagram so only the thumbnail preview image is draggable
